name: object-measurement-ui
description: Vue.js UI for OAK Camera Object Measurement System

scripts.dev:win: npx concurrently --kill-others "npm run backend" "npm run frontend" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold"
scripts.dev:linux: npx concurrently --kill-others "npm run backend" "npm run frontend:linux" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold"
